name: reorderCheck
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.critical.every(function(p){ return Number.isFinite(p.onHand) && Number.isFinite(p.reorderPoint); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/retail.js). 3-arg dispatch via /api/lens/run on key 'retail.reorderCheck'. Deterministic pure compute — drives the RetailActionPanel reorder card (totalProducts/criticalCount/reorderCount/sufficientCount/critical[]/needsReorder[]). POISON: onHand/reorderPoint/dailyUsage coerced via a finite guard (Number.isFinite, not parseFloat) so a poisoned '1e999'/Infinity/NaN collapses to a finite default — no non-finite onHand/daysOfStock ever renders. Non-array products → []; junk entries dropped. Not driven by macro-assassin's fuzzer if name-skipped; authored spec pinned by server/tests/retail-lens-macros.test.js.
